name: Goreinu
description: A Greed Island player, he battles Razor along with Gon, Bisuke en Killua both times. He ends up giving Gon the cards he needs to win the game.  His nen ability is the power to summon two gorillas made of nen. His white gorilla, White Goreinu, is able to change places with Goreinu. His black gorilla, Black Goreinu, is able to switch places with other people.
